# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

- name: Create custom workflow
  id: custom_workflow

  # Define the custom workflow inputs.
  inputs:
    buildCommand1:
      description: Build command 1 for custom workflow 1.
      required: true
      default: echo "Hello, this is custom workflow 1."
    buildCommand2:
      description: Build command 2 for custom workflow 2.
      required: false
      default: echo "Hello, this is custom workflow 2"

- name: Run custom workflow inputs
  run: |
    ${{ inputs.buildCommand1 }}
    ${{ inputs.buildCommand2 }}
